name: Tako
description: Data intelligence agent that searches a knowledge base of 100K+ charts, answers data questions with citations, fetches underlying source content, and runs deep multi-step research.

oauth2.description: Web hosts (Claude.ai, ChatGPT) authenticate via the server's OAuth flow.

apiKey.description: CLI/desktop hosts pass a Tako API token from tako.com as a Bearer credential.

skills.name: Search Charts & Data
skills.description: Fast search over Tako's curated knowledge graph of 100K+ charts and live data — economics, finance, demographics, sports, markets, weather — plus the live web when asked.
examples: Find charts about US GDP growth
Search for Intel vs Nvidia revenue

skills.name: Answer Data Questions
skills.description: Get a grounded, citation-backed answer to a factual data question, drawn from Tako's knowledge graph and/or the live web.
examples: How have mortgage rates moved this year?

skills.name: Fetch Source Contents
skills.description: Fetch the underlying data (CSV) or extracted page text behind any result URL.
examples: Get the CSV behind this Tako chart
Extract the text from this article

skills.name: Deep Research Agent
skills.description: Run a deep multi-step research agent for complex analytical questions requiring transformations, aggregations, and multi-hop reasoning.
examples: Compare revenue per employee across the Mag 7
Analyze the correlation between rates and housing starts
